name: Tomato

pros.title: lycopene gives it a real extra edge
pros.explanation: That is the clearest standout compound in tomato and helps it offer more than just low calories.

pros.title: high volume for very few calories
pros.explanation: That makes tomato easy to use often without much downside.

pros.title: easy low-downside everyday food
pros.explanation: It fits meals easily and does not ask much in return.

cons.title: fibre is modest compared with stronger vegetables
cons.explanation: Useful enough to count, but not a serious separating strength.

cons.title: micronutrient density is decent rather than elite
cons.explanation: Tomato has some upside, but stronger vegetables still beat it on pure micronutrient firepower.

cons.title: acidity can be annoying for some people
cons.explanation: Not a universal issue, but it is a more useful caveat than generic vegetable filler.

sourceNotes: Expanded dataset sample for FoodRanked pressure-testing.
Values are approximate representative placeholders for category tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
